title: Best England team for a long time? That's a fact, says Rice
summary: England captain Declan Rice declared the current squad represents the best team the nation has had in years following their third-place finish at the 2026 World Cup. His assessment reflects confidence in the squad's quality and cohesion during the tournament.
content: Midfielder Declan Rice says "this is the best England group for a very long time" after the Three Lions secure a third-placed finish at the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 英格兰队很长时间以来最强阵容？赖斯说这是事实
zh.summary: 英格兰队长德克兰·赖斯在球队在2026年世界杯获得第三名后，宣称目前的阵容代表该国多年来最强的球队。他的评估反映了球队在比赛中的质量和凝聚力的信心。

title: England beat France in 10-goal thriller to win third-place play-off
summary: England defeated France 6-4 in a high-scoring third-place play-off, with Bukayo Saka scoring three goals. This victory marks England's best men's World Cup finish since winning the tournament in 1966.
content: Bukayo Saka scores a hat-trick as England beat France 6-4 in a thriller to record their best men's World Cup finish since 1966.

zh.title: 英格兰以10球大战击败法国赢得第三名附加赛
zh.summary: 英格兰在进球众多的第三名附加赛中以6-4击败法国，布卡约·萨卡打入三球。这场胜利标志着英格兰自1966年赢得锦标赛以来最好的男子世界杯成绩。

title: Bellingham breaks England World Cup goals record
summary: Jude Bellingham became the first English player to score seven goals in a single World Cup tournament, achieving the milestone with a late strike in the third-place play-off against France. The record demonstrates his exceptional performance throughout the 2026 competition.
content: Jude Bellingham becomes the first Englishman to score seven goals at a single World Cup with a late strike against France.

zh.title: 贝林厄姆创英格兰世界杯进球纪录
zh.summary: 朱德·贝林厄姆成为首位在单届世界杯中打入七球的英格兰球员，在对法国的第三名附加赛中以后期进球实现这一里程碑。这个纪录证明了他在整个2026年赛事中的出色表现。

title: England's best World Cup for 60 years - but how should it be judged?
summary: England achieved their best World Cup result since 1966, securing third place at the 2026 tournament. The article examines whether this strong performance is being adequately recognized amid debate over how to assess England's success.
content: England have secured their best men's World Cup finish since winning the tournament 60 years ago. Is their performance at the 2026 edition being under-appreciated?

zh.title: 英格兰60年来最好的世界杯——但应该如何评价?
zh.summary: 英格兰取得了自1966年以来最好的世界杯成绩,在2026年锦标赛中获得第三名。该文章探讨了这一强劲表现是否得到充分认可,以及如何评估英格兰成功的争论。

title: Brilliant first half, turbulent second - Tuchel
summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel praised his team after they secured third place with a 6-4 victory over France. Tuchel highlighted a strong first half but noted inconsistency in the second period of the match.
content: England manager praises his players as England beat France 6-4 for third place in the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 精彩的上半场,波折的下半场——图赫尔
